claim_boundary.next_gate: Publish the 12 selected QASM hashes and immutable cross-group holdout contract before generating fresh hidden validation seeds.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: Noisy validation acceptance, Lagos repair, scalable exact-output estimation, current calibration, hardware, mitigation, protocol soundness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, or new B10 credit.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: A frozen, replayable, parameter-free output-aware reranking of the 1,536 R136 route realizations.

requirements.label: R136 result and all 1,536 route realizations are hash-bound
all 1,536 candidate QASM programs replay their R136 hashes
the score has no fitted weight and uses only CX and exact readout terms
R138 and R139 validation outcomes are not loaded during selection
all 12 groups expose 128 candidates and one frozen selection
all frozen selections preserve the exact logical output distribution
the output-aware objective changes the Lagos complete-Ising selection
all 12 selected QASM files replay in a fresh process
no noisy holdout or current calibration is consumed during design
repair, hardware, soundness, advantage, BQP, and credit remain unclaimed
